description: Add a one-click button to launch Google Antigravity

variables.name: agent_id
variables.description: The ID of a Coder agent.

variables.name: folder
variables.description: The folder to open in Antigravity IDE.

variables.name: mcp
variables.description: JSON-encoded string to configure MCP servers for Antigravity. When set, writes ~/.gemini/antigravity/mcp_config.json.

variables.name: open_recent
variables.description: Open the most recent workspace or folder. Falls back to the folder if there is no recent workspace or folder to open.
